translation.sobre2: My name is Alan, and I am a Full Stack Developer with a strong focus on Front-End development, specializing in building modern, scalable, and user-centered web applications. I have experience developing responsive and high-performance interfaces using React, Next.js, JavaScript, and TypeScript, while applying best practices in architecture, component-based design, SEO, and accessibility.
translation.sobre3: I develop complete web solutions, ranging from landing pages and dashboards to complex web applications, working with REST API integrations, user authentication, databases, and cloud services. My technical experience includes Java, C#, .NET, Node.js, SQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Supabase, and AWS.
translation.sobre4: I also work with process automation and system integrations using n8n, creating solutions that improve operational efficiency and reduce manual tasks. Experienced in Agile environments, cross-functional team collaboration, and delivering high-quality solutions that generate real business value for companies and users.
translation.ditado: Try once, twice, three times and if possible try the fourth, fifth and as many times as necessary. Just don't give up on the first attempts, persistence is the friend of conquest. If you want to get where most don't, do what most don't.
translation.projeto1: Project inspired by SpaceX using HTML, Sass, and Bootstrap. HTML structures the content, Sass brings efficient and customized styling, and Bootstrap ensures a responsive and modern design. The site reflects SpaceX's innovation, with a clean and visually impactful interface.
translation.projeto2: Vexel Tech is a company specializing in the development of modern websites, landing pages, and digital solutions. Focused on high performance, conversion, and results, the project stands out for its clean design and optimized interfaces to provide the best user experience and boost businesses in the digital environment.
translation.projeto3: Development of an academic and scientific portal for the UNICAMP Rede Centro-Norte Brasil. The website centralizes regional studies, territorial development research, and geospatial data. It features an interactive experience for users through an educational quiz about the region's geography and a hidden educational game as an easter egg, optimizing engagement for students and researchers.
translation.projeto4: Development of a complete institutional portal for the Association of Brazilian Geographers (AGB - Campinas Section). The project features a dynamic carousel in the hero section, an institutional preloader optimized for performance, a digital library with a publication archive, and integrated blogs. Developed with a focus on high performance, digital accessibility, professional design, and excellent SEO ranking.
translation.rodape: Developed by Alan Felipe / All rights reserved © 2024
